title: Detective Mitarai's Casebook: The Clockwork Current
original_title: 探偵ミタライの事件簿 星籠の海
overview: Private Detective Kiyoshi Mitarai and Miyuki Ogawa arrive in Fukuyama, Hiroshima Prefecture. They are interested in a case which involves discovered bodies. The bodies were found drifting in the Seto Inland Sea, where the currents repeat every 6 hours.
